summary: Planned unified code review pipeline orchestrator: 12 tasks to add PipelineContext/PipelineResult types, implement runPipeline() orchestrating all 7 phases, create run_code_review MCP tool, and upgrade CLI with --comment/--ci/--deep/--no-mechanical flags.
pending: Task 1: Add PipelineContext, PipelineFlags, and PipelineResult types
Task 2: Export new pipeline types from review barrel
Task 3: Create pipeline orchestrator test file (TDD - write failing tests)
Task 4: Implement pipeline orchestrator (make tests green)
Task 5: Export runPipeline from review barrel
Task 6: Add pipeline orchestrator tests for --comment flag and GitHub output
Task 7: Add pipeline orchestrator tests for mechanical stop and gate edge cases
Task 8: Create MCP tool definition for run_code_review
Task 9: Register run_code_review in MCP server tool index
Task 10: Upgrade CLI review command with pipeline flags
Task 11: Add PipelineContext inline import type for ExclusionSet
Task 12: Final verification -- run full test suite and validate
concerns: ExclusionSet inline import type in PipelineContext must use import('./exclusion-set').ExclusionSet to avoid circular dependency with types.ts
MCP tool registration pattern in tools/index.ts must be verified at checkpoint before Task 9
CLI review.ts replacement is a full rewrite -- existing tests or consumers of runAgentReview() may need adjustment
parseDiff output shape (codeChanges.files[].status, .diff) must be verified against actual CodeChanges type
decisions: Pipeline orchestrator lives in packages/core/src/review/pipeline-orchestrator.ts, not in CLI or MCP
PipelineContext is a mutable context object threaded through phases; PipelineResult is the immutable return value
Mechanical check errors are caught gracefully -- pipeline continues with empty exclusion set rather than crashing
Context scoping errors are caught gracefully -- pipeline uses minimal empty bundles as fallback
Tasks 6 and 7 are parallelizable (both add tests to the same file but different describe blocks)
